description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. In the build job execute the exact shell commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/xiayesuifeng/arch-go-qt:latest ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/xiayesuifeng/arch-go-qt:latest. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
